title: RF elements Asymmetrical Horn Wideband Antenna, 6/5 GHz, 15dBi, 90 В°
description: The AH90-WB is a 6 GHz and 5 GHz sector "horn" antenna from RF elements, featuring a 90 В° asymmetric beam angle, 15 dBi gain , and a TwistPort connector. This antenna offers a perfect combination of features to address the key weaknesses of todayГўВҖВҷs mainstream sector antennas The TwistPort connector is practically lossless and revolutionizes established standards with its ease of use. There are no RF connectors or RF cables that cause significant signal losses. Compared to commonly used coaxial cables and connectors, the loss on TwistPort is almost immeasurable. Connecting and disconnecting is brilliantly simple and can be done with one hand The AH90-WB asymmetric antenna does not emit side lobes, focusing energy into a single main beam. This is one of the most important features in wireless networks. Thanks to these unique radiation characteristics, the antenna picks up significantly less noise compared to existing mainstream sector antennas. Noise issues are directly related to the side lobes of an antennaГўВҖВ”an unavoidable aspect in most competing products. The AH90-WB behaves differently, being virtually "deaf" outside the mainвҖҰ Traditional sector antennas have a specific coverage patternГўВҖВ”if the access point (AP) is too high, nearby clients suffer from poor signal quality. As the saying goes, "under the candlestick, itГўВҖВҷs darkest." Asymmetric sector antennas emit signals with a circularly flattened beam shape. As a result, the coverage of asymmetric sector antennas is nearly without dead zones, satisfying clients located close to the AP Unique radiationвҖҰ
